title: Use the Pythagorean project or Cheiro-sourced letter mapping

positions.summary: Map normalized Latin letters through repeating values 1–9 as an explicit modern project policy.
Use the isolated historical 1–8 letter mapping with Cheiro provenance and no Pythagorean master-number preservation.

default_policy.rationale: The existing Pythagorean project mapping remains the compatibility default; Chaldean requires explicit selection.

user_disclosure: The selected Pythagorean or Cheiro-sourced Chaldean mapping is recorded; values and reduction policies are never mixed.
